scripts.deploy:build: npm run optimize-media && npm run build
scripts.s3:sync-assets: aws s3 sync dist/assets/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/assets/ --cache-control max-age=31536000,public --delete
scripts.s3:sync-media: aws s3 sync dist/media/optimized/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/media/optimized/ --cache-control max-age=31536000,immutable --exclude '*.mp4' --exclude '*.webm'
scripts.s3:sync-video: aws s3 sync dist/media/optimized/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/media/optimized/ --cache-control max-age=2592000,public --exclude '*' --include '*.mp4' --include '*.webm'
scripts.s3:sync-avif: aws s3 sync dist/media/optimized/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/media/optimized/ --exclude '*' --include '*.avif' --content-type image/avif --cache-control max-age=31536000,immutable
scripts.s3:sync-webm: aws s3 sync dist/media/optimized/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/media/optimized/ --exclude '*' --include '*.webm' --content-type video/webm --cache-control max-age=2592000,public
scripts.s3:sync-html: aws s3 cp dist/index.html s3://YOUR-BUCKET-NAME/index.html --cache-control max-age=0,no-cache,no-store,must-revalidate --content-type text/html
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:build && npm run s3:sync-assets && npm run s3:sync-media && npm run s3:sync-video && npm run s3:sync-avif && npm run s3:sync-webm && npm run s3:sync-html && npm run cloudfront:invalidate
